effects.change_from_current: the current encoder omits the exact two-other-card hand cost and Pokémon search/reveal/shuffle
effects.text:
You can use this card only if you discard 2 other cards from your hand.

Search your deck for a Pokémon, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

effects.change_from_current: the current encoder omits the once-per-player-turn Stadium search for a Marnie's Pokémon
effects.text: Once during each player’s turn, that player may search their deck for a Marnie’s Pokémon, reveal it, and put it into their hand. Then, that player shuffles their deck.

effects.change_from_current: the current encoder omits the Trainer-card deck search, reveal, and shuffle
effects.text: Search your deck for a Trainer card, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

effects.change_from_current: the current encoder omits the fair coin and heads-only opposing attached-Energy discard
effects.formula_question: discard one chosen opposing attached Energy on heads, else no effect
effects.text: Flip a coin. If heads, discard an Energy from 1 of your opponent’s Pokémon.

effects.change_from_current: the current encoder omits both non-Rule-Box damage prevention from opposing Pokémon ex/V and the card-level discard-to-hand/deck prohibition
effects.text:
Prevent all damage done to Pokémon that don’t have a Rule Box (both yours and your opponent’s) by attacks from the opponent’s Pokémon {ex} and Pokémon {V}. (Pokémon {ex}, Pokémon {V}, etc. have Rule Boxes.)

This card can’t be put into your hand or deck from the discard pile.

effects.change_from_current: the current encoder omits full healing of one damaged own Mega Evolution Pokémon ex and the heal-success-gated all-Energy return
effects.formula_question: heal target to full; if any damage healed, move all its Energy to hand
effects.text: Heal all damage from 1 of your Mega Evolution Pokémon {ex}. If you healed any damage in this way, put all Energy attached to that Pokémon into your hand.

effects.change_from_current: the current encoder omits the Active-tool-holder damaged-by-opponent-attack trigger, even-if-KO persistence, and attacker-to-opponent-Bench Energy movement
effects.text: If the Pokémon this card is attached to is in the Active Spot and is damaged by an attack from your opponent’s Pokémon (even if this Pokémon is Knocked Out), move an Energy from the Attacking Pokémon to 1 of your opponent’s Benched Pokémon.

effects.change_from_current: the current encoder omits symmetric hand replacement with four cards each
effects.text: Each player shuffles their hand into their deck and draws 4 cards.

effects.change_from_current: the current encoder omits the once-per-turn Stadium draw gated by a Team Rocket-named Supporter played from hand this turn
effects.formula_question: may draw 2 iff a Team Rocket-named Supporter was played from hand this turn
effects.text: Once during each player’s turn, if they played a Supporter card that has "Team Rocket" in its name from their hand this turn, they may draw 2 cards.

effects.change_from_current: the current encoder omits top-seven inspection and the shared up-to-two Grass-Pokémon/Basic-Grass-Energy selection
effects.text: Look at the top 7 cards of your deck. You may reveal up to 2 in any combination of {G} Pokémon and Basic {G} Energy cards you find there and put them into your hand. Shuffle the other cards back into your deck.

effects.change_from_current: the existing Tool bake exactly preserves the holder/plain and opposing-Active-ex gates with +30 damage

current_encoder.reason: current encoder represents only reviewed stat bakes

effects.text: If the Pokémon this card is attached to doesn’t have a Rule Box, the attacks it uses do 30 more damage to your opponent’s Active Pokémon {ex} (before applying Weakness and Resistance). (Pokémon {ex}, Pokémon {V}, etc. have Rule Boxes.)

effects.change_from_current: the current encoder omits the up-to-two distinct Basic Energy types and the exact one-to-hand/other-to-Pokémon split
effects.formula_question: legal distinct-type selections and hand-versus-attachment assignment
effects.text: Search your deck for up to 2 Basic Energy cards of different types, reveal them, and put 1 of them into your hand. Attach the other to 1 of your Pokémon. Then, shuffle your deck.

effects.change_from_current: the current encoder omits the shared up-to-two Tool selector across both players and owner-correct discard destinations
effects.text: Choose up to 2 Pokémon Tools attached to Pokémon (yours or your opponent’s) and discard them.

effects.change_from_current: the current Stadium bake has no modifiers and therefore omits complete suppression of all attached Pokémon Tool effects

current_encoder.reason: current encoder represents only reviewed stat bakes

effects.text: Pokémon Tools attached to each Pokémon (both yours and your opponent’s) have no effect.

effects.change_from_current: the current encoder omits the combined Supporter and Team Rocket name filters, reveal, and shuffle
effects.text: Search your deck for a Supporter card that has “Team Rocket” in its name, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

effects.change_from_current: the current encoder omits draw-until-five versus draw-until-eight based on every own Pokémon being Team Rocket's
effects.formula_question: max(0, target_hand_size-current_hand), target 8 iff all own Pokémon are Team Rocket's else 5
effects.text: Draw cards until you have 5 cards in your hand. If all of your Pokémon in play are Team Rocket’s Pokémon, draw cards until you have 8 cards in your hand instead.

effects.change_from_current: the current encoder omits the prior-turn Team Rocket Pokémon KO gate and asymmetric 5/3 hand replacement
effects.formula_question: legal iff Team Rocket Pokémon KO history is true; then owner draws 5 and opponent 3
effects.text:
You can use this card only if any of your Team Rocket’s Pokémon were Knocked Out during your opponent’s last turn.

Each player shuffles their hand into their deck. Then, you draw 5 cards, and your opponent draws 3 cards.

effects.change_from_current: the current encoder omits both Team Rocket filters, own-switch-first order, and success-gated opponent gust
effects.text: Switch your Active Team Rocket’s Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Team Rocket’s Pokémon. If you do, switch in 1 of your opponent’s Benched Pokémon to the Active Spot.

effects.change_from_current: the current encoder omits the up-to-three Basic Team Rocket's Pokémon search and the explicit first-player first-turn permission
effects.text:
If you go first, you may use this card during your first turn.

Search your deck for up to 3 Basic Team Rocket’s Pokémon, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

effects.text: Search your deck for a Basic {F} Energy card or a Basic {F} Pokémon, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.
